name: Can't Cope, Won't Cope
overview: A darkly comic drama about two young women, as one of them starts to spiral out of control. Aisling used to getting her own way and Danielle, never one to hog the spotlight, is only too happy to go along with it. But things are changing. Reality is about to hit them, and hit them hard

trailers.title: Can't Cope Won't Cope | RTÉ2 | New Drama | Starts 19th September
